pokemon:dewgong.name: Dewgong
pokemon:dewgong.summary: Dewgong loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this Pokémon sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Dewgong loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this Pokémon sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.
In snow, the pure white coat covering its body obscures it from predators.
Its streamlined body has low resistance, and it swims around cold oceans at a speed of eight knots.
Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.
It sleeps under shallow ocean waters during the day, then looks for food at night when it's cold.
In snow, the pure white coat covering its body obscures it from predators.
It loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this POKéMON sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.
Its body is covered with a pure white fur. The colder the weather, the more active it becomes.
Its streamlined body has little drag in water. The colder the temperature, the friskier it gets.
Its streamlined body has little drag in water. The colder the temperature, the friskier it gets.
It stores thermal energy in the body. It swims at a steady eight knots even in intensely cold waters.
Its entire body is a snowy white. Unharmed by even intense cold, it swims powerfully in icy waters.
Its entire body is a snowy white. Unharmed by even intense cold, it swims powerfully in icy waters.
Dewgong loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this Pokémon sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.
In snow, the pure white coat covering its body obscures it from predators.
In snow, the pure white coat covering its body obscures it from predators.
Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.
DEWGONG loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this POKéMON sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.
DEWGONG loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this POKéMON sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.
It loves frigid seas with ice floes. It uses its long tail to change swimming direction quickly.
It loves frigid seas with ice floes. It uses its long tail to change swimming direction quickly.
It sunbathes on the beach after meals. The rise in its body temperature helps its digestion.
It swims through the ocean at a speed of eight knots, searching for Pokémon that will become its prey. It’s especially fond of Wishiwashi.
In snow, the pure white coat covering its body obscures it from predators.
Its streamlined body has low resistance, and it swims around cold oceans at a speed of eight knots.
Its body is covered with a pure white fur. The colder the weather, the more active it becomes.
Its streamlined body has little drag in water. The colder the temperature, the friskier it gets.
Its entire body is a snowy-white. Unharmed by even intense cold, it swims powerfully in icy waters.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Dewgong loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this Pokémon sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.

pokemon:seel.name: Seel
pokemon:seel.summary: Seel hunts for prey in the frigid sea underneath sheets of ice. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Seel hunts for prey in the frigid sea underneath sheets of ice. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.
A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up ice.
The colder it gets, the better it feels. It joyfully swims around oceans so cold that they are filled with floating ice.
The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.
The light blue fur that covers it keeps it protected against the cold. It loves iceberg- filled oceans.
A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up ice.
SEEL hunt for prey in frigid, ice-covered seas. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.
Covered with light blue fur, its hide is thick and tough. It is active in bitter cold of minus 40 degrees Fahrenheit.
Although it can't walk well on land, it is a graceful swimmer. It espe­ cially loves being in frigid seas.
Although it can’t walk well on land, it is a graceful swimmer. It especially loves being in frigid seas.
The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick icebergs.
Loves freezing-cold conditions. Relishes swimming in a frigid climate of around 14 degrees Fahrenheit.
Loves freezing-cold conditions. Relishes swimming in a frigid climate of around 14 degrees Fahrenheit.
Seel hunts for prey in the frigid sea underneath sheets of ice. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.
A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up ice.
A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up ice.
The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.
SEEL hunts for prey in the frigid sea underneath sheets of ice. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.
SEEL hunts for prey in the frigid sea underneath sheets of ice. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.
In daytime, it is often found asleep on the seabed in shallow waters. Its nostrils close while it swims.
In daytime, it is often found asleep on the seabed in shallow waters. Its nostrils close while it swims.
Thanks to its thick fat, cold seas don’t bother it at all, but it gets tired pretty easily in warm waters.
It has always been supposed that Seel live only in cold seas. Their having shown up in Alola is a mystery.
A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up ice.
The colder it gets, the better it feels. It joyfully swims around oceans so cold that they are filled with floating ice.
A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up ice.
Covered with light blue fur, its hide is thick and tough. It is active in bitter cold of -40 degrees Fahrenheit.
Loves freezing cold conditions. Relishes swimming in a frigid cli­ mate of around 14F degrees.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Seel hunts for prey in the frigid sea underneath sheets of ice. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.
